name: handoff
description: | Use when managing a two-session handoff — inspecting, picking up, or reviewing a committed handoff package produced by a session=two scope run. The operator interface over the cross-environment handoff lifecycle (plan in one session, build in another, review back in the first). Trigger with /hyperflow:handoff, "list handoffs", "pick up the handoff", "review the handoff build".
author: jeremylongshore
